319.code: return type + " " + value + " at line " + line;
319.reason: [Error: Output format includes " at line ...", but the required format for lexical analysis output is only "category code character/string" without line number.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: Output format includes " at line ...", but the required format for lexical analysis output is only "category code character/string" without line number.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  ERROR: Output format should not include " at line " and line number. Expected format is "type value" only.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The expected output format does not include "at line X". It should only be "type value".
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  The expected output format for correct programs does not include line numbers (e.g., "INTTK int"), but this method appends " at line " + line, causing a format mismatch.

158.reason: [This condition is incorrect: it sets inComment = true for a single '/' at the end of line, but should output DIV token instead. Also, after handling '//' comment, the loop doesn't skip the rest of the line properly because p is not updated in the outer loop.]
